ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "women_size" TEXT /* Women's size equivalent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "country_standard" TEXT /* Country size standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Women, Men, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height measurement range (e.g., 165-170cm) */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement range (e.g., 86-91cm) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range (e.g., 71-76cm) */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range (e.g., 86-91cm) */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement range (e.g., 36-38cm) */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range (e.g., 56-58cm) */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range (e.g., 70-75cm) */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses, outerwear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Broader category (e.g., Casual, Formal, Sportswear) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the clothing type is suitable (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Primary material used (e.g., Cotton, Polyester, Silk) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size standard
Name of the size standard (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL)
Country size standard (e.g., US, EU, UK)
Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Women, Men, Unisex)
Unique identifier for each clothing type
Name of the clothing type (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses, outerwear)
Season for which the clothing type is suitable (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter)
Primary material used (e.g., Cotton, Polyester, Silk)
